ogTitle: Hawthorn vs Hawthorn East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hawthorn and Hawthorn East.
heading: Hawthorn vs Hawthorn East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hawthorn, Victoria and Hawthorn East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hawthorn has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Hawthorn East (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hawthorn or Hawthorn East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hawthorn has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Hawthorn East scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hawthorn scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Hawthorn East scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hawthorn or Hawthorn East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hawthorn has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
